full_text:
Sun Jun (Ziyuan) 孫峻 (子遠)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Jun (孫峻), styledZiyuan (子遠). Assassinated Zhuge Ke and later controlled the court. Sun Jun was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Jun lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
